lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Hello there, [rank].

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: I've not seen you round these parts before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'm still fairly new here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [Rank]?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You heard correct.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: The name's Gloria. Nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You too. I'm [player name]. What are you doing hanging round the Colosseum?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: I've become quite fond of keeping an eye on the contenders and sharing news of their progress to those around the city.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You see, inside the Colosseum you'll earn what's called Glory.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's Glory?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Glory will improve your status and reputation around the city. You might even get some rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How does Glory work?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: It's simple really, you get Glory from participating in the Colosseum! You'll get more Glory the better you perform.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Performance is measured by a few things. For example, how many hits you take or how quickly you complete the challenges.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good to me. Have you earned any Glory yourself?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Ha! No. But I do have this fancy armour which is pretty glorious! You may be lucky enough to get some of your own from within the Colosseum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about these rewards.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: But of course! People all accross Varlamore will hear of your Glory.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about these rewards.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: But of course! People all accross Varlamore will hear of your Glory.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You'll get a range of benefits depending on your status.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I improve my status?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Earn more Glory of course. The more you earn, the better your standing in the city.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You can check your status on that board over there. I keep it up to date.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What exactly are the benefits?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Reaching Brawler status will give you access to the bank within the Colosseum.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Reaching Challenger status will allow you to respawn in Civitas illa Fortis if you so desire.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Reaching Gladiator status might persuade some of the more shady folk around the city to give you more money for... Let's just say illicit valuables.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Reaching Hero status will allow you to travel to the Colosseum via the Ring of Dueling.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Reaching Champion status will grant you free herb patch protection just west of the city.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: And reaching Grand Champion status will unlock you the Fortis Salute emote.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know how much Glory I need for each status?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You'll have to figure that out on your journey to becoming a Grand Champion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know my Glory status?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: That I do, [player name].

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: It seems as though you are still a Rookie to the people of Fortis.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You'll make a name of yourself in no time, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do my very best.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You are a Brawler!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You are a Challenger!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You are a Gladiator!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You are a Hero!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You are a Champion!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You are a Grand Champion!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You can check that board over there to see any details of your Glory. I try to update it regularly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Hello there, [rank].

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: I see you've been trying to conquer the Colosseum, eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have indeed, and I will become a champion!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: That's it, positive thoughts.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: I was watching when you became Grand Champion of the Colosseum. It was truly something to behold.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: What brings you over to me today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if we could talk about Glory?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: But of course. What do you wish to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you change my respawn point?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: What would you like changing about it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think you could change my respawn point to Civitas illa Fortis?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: I'm sure I could put in a good word at the palace now that you are a [rank].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Anytime, [rank].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I'll leave it for now.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if I could respawn back in Lumbridge instead of the city?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Not a problem. I'll let the palace know right away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I'll leave it for now.

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'm good.

sections.title: The first time speaking with Gloria with Grand Champion rank

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: Hello there, Grand Champion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Grand Champion?

lines.speaker: Gloria
lines.text: You heard correct.

lines.speaker: Gloria

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Gloria

lines.speaker: Gloria

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Gloria
